news.t: Columbia Threadneedle Investments Launches Six New ETFs Across Equity and Fixed Income

overview.description: The Columbia AAA CLO ETF (AAAC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund targeting AAA-rated CLOs of any maturity. It seeks to produce current income and capital preservation. AAAC was launched on Dec 11, 2025 and is issued by Columbia Threadneedle.

data.title: Columbia Threadneedle Investments Launches Six New ETFs Across Equity and Fixed Income
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Columbia Threadneedle Investments today announced the launch of six new exchange-traded funds (ETFs), further expanding its differentiated range of actively managed and Resear...
